import pytest
from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_with_item_exactly_filling_capacity():
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    result = knapsack(capacity, items)
    assert result == 10, f"Expected 10 but got {result}. Item with weight 3 exactly fills capacity and should be selected."
